timeUnit.description: semantic unit of the discrete schedule; custom still requires ordered labels in timeAxis

constraints.order: chronological; item index defines the discrete boundary used by phase/milestone layout

constraints.collision: labels are nowrap; more than 4 milestones collide on the lane

at.description: integer boundary on timeAxis (e.g. 1 = end of unit 1, 3 = end of unit 3). The timeline layout compiler derives both the diamond and its dashed connector.

constraints.order: execution sequence; renderer supplies ordinal chrome

ordinal.description: derived from item index (01, 02, …); resolver writes .phase .n — never authored

kind.description: work = solid teal bar; continuous = dashed outline bar (.bar.cont)

startUnit.description: first timeAxis unit the phase occupies (1-based); resolver converts start/end to the bar's left% and width%

endUnit.description: last timeAxis unit the phase occupies (1-based, inclusive); must be >= startUnit and <= timeAxis length

barLabel.description: editable label inside either a work or continuous bar; its real fit is validated against the rendered bar geometry, not an arbitrary unit-count rule

presentation.composition: one discrete axis + one milestone lane + 3–5 phase bars over a shared track; legend is fixed chrome
presentation.schedulePolicy: timeUnit, labels, phase spans, axis grid, milestone markers and connectors are compiled from one schedule; a milestone must land on a real unit boundary of the declared timeAxis
